secondary_subtitle: Choose an additional language for content
perm_desc: To save your favorite videos and photos directly to your gallery, Snappy Save needs permission to access your storage.
perm_blocked_desc: Please enable storage access in your device settings to save media.
onboarding_1_text: Find the video you want and copy the link from your favorite social app.
onboarding_2_text: Open Snappy Save, paste the link, and we will fetch the media for you.
onboarding_3_text: Download in high quality and save it directly to your device library.
premium_subtitle: Support us and unlock all features.
rate_us_sub: Enjoying our app? Give us 5 stars!
ws_desc: To show statuses, we need permission to read the WhatsApp media folder.
ws_empty: No statuses found. Open WhatsApp and watch some statuses first!
ws_alert_msg:
On the next screen:
1. Navigate to: Android > media > com.whatsapp > WhatsApp > Media > .Statuses
2. Click 'USE THIS FOLDER'.

(If you don't see .Statuses, click the 3-dots in top right and 'Show hidden files')
ws_save_error: Failed to save status. Ensure you have viewed it in WhatsApp first.
tt_invalid_link: Please paste a valid TikTok link.
tt_error_extract: Could not extract video. Try another link.
tt_dl_failed: Link might have expired. Try again.
fb_invalid_link: Please paste a valid Facebook link.
fb_error_extract: Could not find video. Ensure the post is Public.
ig_not_found: Video not found. Instagram blocked the extraction.
li_invalid_link: Please paste a valid LinkedIn post link.
li_error_extract: Could not find video. Ensure the post is public.
pin_error_stream: This video uses streaming format. Try another pin.
pin_not_found: This may not be a downloadable video.
sc_invalid_link: Please paste a valid Snapchat link.
tw_invalid_link: Please paste a valid Twitter or X link.
tw_not_found: X/Twitter is blocking the request. Ensure the tweet has a video.
tw_error_dl: Could not fetch the video file.
yt_invalid_link: Please enter a valid YouTube URL.
yt_timeout: Extraction took too long. Try a different video.
yt_error_stream: Could not find an extractable video stream.
yt_error_sig: YouTube signature protection blocked this request.
pp_s1_text: Snappy Save does not collect or store your personal media on our servers. All downloads are processed directly on your device.
pp_s2_text: We require storage permissions only to save media to your gallery. We do not access your private photos or files.
pp_s3_text: We use Google AdMob to serve ads. These services may collect device identifiers to provide personalized content.
